name: doubao-dream-skin
description: A reversible CDP-injected skin for the Doubao Windows desktop app.

scripts.check: node --check scripts/cdp-client.js && node --check scripts/injector.js && node --check browser-extension/shared/defaults.js && node --check browser-extension/shared/color-engine.js && node --check browser-extension/content/content.js && node --check browser-extension/popup/popup.js && node --check browser-extension/options/options.js && node scripts/injector.js --self-test && node tests/mock-cdp.test.js && node tests/browser-extension.test.js
